evidence.q1: Sections are numbered 1 through 16 sequentially; cross-reference in Section 1: "'Excluded Liabilities' has the meaning stated in Section 4" resolves correctly to existing Section 4.
evidence.q2: 'Excluded Liabilities' is defined once in Section 1 (by reference to Section 4), and used consistently thereafter in Sections 4, 5, and 9. All other defined terms are used consistently.
evidence.q3: No vague time/quantity phrasing; document uses precise commercial terms such as "60 days after closing", "12 months after closing", "24 months", "$24,000,000", and "$1,850,000".
evidence.q4: No archaic or out-of-register legal diction; the entire document uses modern commercial English without archaic terms.
evidence.q5: All sentences are grammatically correct and internally consistent; no sentence reads as contradictory or broken.
evidence.q6: Clause phrasing register is consistent throughout; all sections match in tone and drafting style, with no divergence suggesting a different author.
